title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
